name: eios
description: Executive Intelligence Operating System (EIOS) — full-stack reference implementation across Volumes 1-7

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix web install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix web run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix web run build
